expectations.text: Has at least 4 distinct priority levels or numbered sections
expectations.evidence: Four clearly labeled Priority sections: PRIORITY 1 (defensive fixes), PRIORITY 2 (unit tests), PRIORITY 3 (BERT refactor), PRIORITY 4 (future work)

expectations.text: Covers the defensive fixes: minilm_relation_heads validation, attention check, __init__.py, .gitignore
expectations.evidence: Priority 1 checklist items 1.1-1.4 explicitly cover all four: minilm_relation_heads validation, attention output validation, __init__.py creation, and .gitignore creation, each with file paths, line numbers, and code content

expectations.text: Covers unit tests as a missing item
expectations.evidence: Priority 2 section: 'Create advanced/tests/test_losses.py' with table of 11 functions to test, each with specific verification criteria

expectations.text: Covers the BERT refactor including code duplication and MiniLMv2 forward pass
expectations.evidence: Priority 3 sections 3a and 3b: 8 replacement items with exact line ranges and import statements, plus MiniLMv2 duplicate forward pass fix with signature change instructions

expectations.text: Covers future features from README (GKD, sequence-level, DPO, TAKD, LoRA or similar)
expectations.evidence: Priority 4c lists all five README features: GKD, Sequence-level distillation, DPO/Preference distillation, TAKD, LoRA on student — each with description and effort estimate

expectations.text: Items are ordered by priority: quick fixes first, future features last
expectations.evidence: Structured as P1 (immediate/defensive) → P2 (tests) → P3 (refactor) → P4 (future/design), with explicit 'Recommendation' section confirming the ordering rationale

expectations.text: References specific file paths in the advanced/ folder
expectations.evidence: Every checklist item includes full paths: 'E:\Distillation\advanced\distill_advanced.py', 'E:\Distillation\advanced\__init__.py', 'E:\Distillation\advanced\tests\test_losses.py', with line numbers

eval_feedback.overall: Perfect score. The with-skill run produced a comprehensive, well-organized, actionable checklist that directly mirrors the skill's structure while adding useful metadata (effort estimates, dependency notes, blocker section).
